apothecary.flavorText: Duplicants will not fabricate items unless recipes are queued.Some medications help prevent diseases, while others aim to alleviate existing illness.

decontamination_shower.name: Decontamination Shower
decontamination_shower.description: Uses Water to remove both Germs and Radiation.Decontaminates both Duplicants and their Clothing.
decontamination_shower.summary: The Decontamination Shower is a wash station exclusive to the Spaced Out! DLC that uses Water to remove germs from Duplicants who walk past it in the (configurable) direction its arrows are facing (similarly to Sinks).
decontamination_shower.flavorText: Don't forget to decontaminate behind your ears.

disease_clinic.name: Disease Clinic
disease_clinic.description: Allows Duplicants to administer powerful treatments to sick Duplicants.Duplicants must possess the Advanced Medical Care Skill to treat peers.
disease_clinic.summary: The Disease Clinic is a specialized building to cure Zombie Spores, a rare and highly debilitating condition.
disease_clinic.flavorText: Disease clinics require power, but treat more serious illnesses than sick bays alone.
disease_clinic.requires: Advanced Medical Care1 kg Serum Vial

hand_sanitizer.name: Hand Sanitizer
hand_sanitizer.description: Removes most Germs from Duplicants.Germ-covered Duplicants use Hand Sanitizers when passing by in the selected direction.
hand_sanitizer.summary: The Hand Sanitizer is a Medicine Building that uses Bleach Stone to remove four times as many surface Germs from Duplicants as Wash Basins or Sinks. Duplicants that have surface Germs will use it when walking by in the direction of the arrow.
hand_sanitizer.flavorText: Hand sanitizers kill germs more effectively than wash basins.

lubrication_station.name: Lubrication Station
lubrication_station.description: Uses Phyto Oil or Crude Oil to keep Duplicants' bionic parts running smoothly.
lubrication_station.summary: Lubrication Station is a building used by Bionic Duplicants to fully replenish its Gear Oil using piped Phyto Oil or Crude Oil.
lubrication_station.flavorText: A fresh supply of oil keeps the ol' joints from getting too creaky.

massage_table.name: Massage Table
massage_table.description: Rapidly reduces Stress for the Duplicant user.Duplicants will automatically seek a massage table when Stress exceeds breaktime range.
massage_table.summary: The Massage Table is used to reduce a Duplicant's stress level. It provides a direct -30% per cycle "Relaxing" condition, and can cure Sore Back after being used for some time.
massage_table.flavorText: Massage tables quickly reduce extreme Stress, at the cost of power production and duplicant time.
massage_table.effects: Stress: -30% per Cycle (60% if inside a Massage Clinic)Cures: Sore Back

sick_bay.name: Sick Bay
sick_bay.description: Allows Duplicants to administer basic treatments to sick Duplicants.Duplicants must possess the Bedside Manner Skill to treat peers.
sick_bay.summary: The Sick Bay is a medical building. It consumes Medical Pack to cure Slimelung. It requires a duplicant with the Bedside Manner skill to perform the doctoring errand on a sick duplicant.
sick_bay.flavorText: Sick bays can be placed in hospital rooms to decrease the likelihood of disease spreading.
sick_bay.requires: Duplicant operation Bedside Manner1 kg Medical Pack

sink.name: Sink
sink.description: Removes Germs from Duplicants.Germ-covered Duplicants use Sinks when passing by in the selected direction.
sink.summary: The Sink is a Medicine Building that cleanses Duplicants of Germs. Duplicants will use a Sink when passing by in the direction of the arrow, similar to a Wash Basin. However, Sinks do not have to be filled and emptied by a Duplicant and have a liquid input and output for Liquid Pipes instead.
sink.flavorText: Sinks are plumbed and do not need to be manually emptied or refilled.
sink.effects: Polluted Water +5 kg per useAll Diseases: -120,000 germs per use

tasteful_memorial.name: Tasteful Memorial
tasteful_memorial.description: Provides a final resting place for deceased Duplicants.Living Duplicants will automatically place an unburied corpse inside.
tasteful_memorial.summary: The Tasteful Memorial is used to bury dead Duplicants. Living Duplicants will automatically place an unburied corpse inside.
tasteful_memorial.flavorText: Burying dead Duplicants reduces health hazards and stress on the colony.

triage_cot.name: Triage Cot
triage_cot.description: Accelerates Health restoration and the healing of physical injuries.Revives incapacitated Duplicants.
triage_cot.summary: The Triage Cot restores 50 points of a Duplicant's health per cycle, 1% of their breath per second and 10% stress per cycle. While a Duplicant lays on the Triage Cot, they are considered to be and another Duplicant can treat the patient to give them the "Receiving Treatment" buff, which improves Triage Cot's effects to 75 health and 20% stress per cycle.
triage_cot.flavorText: Duplicants use triage cots to recover from physical injuries and receive aid from peers.

wash_basin.name: Wash Basin
wash_basin.description: Removes some Germs from Duplicants.Germ-covered Duplicants use Wash Basins when passing by in the selected direction.
wash_basin.summary: The Wash Basin is a Medicine Building that cleanses Duplicants of Germs. The Germs removed from Duplicants are deposited in Polluted Water in the building's storage. When the amount of Polluted Water reaches 200 kg, it will be dropped as a bottle on the bottom-left tile.
wash_basin.flavorText: Germ spread can be reduced by building these where Duplicants often get dirty.
wash_basin.requires: Supply of WaterWater: -5 kg per use
wash_basin.effects: Polluted Water: +5 kg per useDestroys 120,000 germs on Duplicants

oxygen_building.name: Oxygen (Building)
oxygen_building.description: Oxygen buildings focus on Oxygen production.

algae_terrarium.name: Algae Terrarium
algae_terrarium.description: Consumes Algae to produce Oxygen and remove some Carbon Dioxide.Gains a 10% efficiency boost in direct Light.
algae_terrarium.summary: The Algae Terrarium is a building used to produce and remove a small amount of (CO2 is not required to produce Oxygen). The Terrarium needs to be supplied with Algae and Water to function, and Polluted Water has to be removed periodically.
algae_terrarium.flavorText: Algae colony, Duplicant colony... We're more alike than we are different.
algae_terrarium.effects: Oxygen: 40 g/s @ +(44 g/s in Light)Carbon Dioxide: -333.33 mg/s Polluted Water: 290.33 g/s @ +

breathing_station.name: Breathing Station
breathing_station.description: Provides breathable Oxygen to submerged Duplicants via a connected Gas Pipe input.Duplicants catch their breath faster by using a breathing station than by surfacing for air.

carbon_skimmer.name: Carbon Skimmer
carbon_skimmer.description: Uses Water to filter Carbon Dioxide from the air.
carbon_skimmer.summary: The Carbon Skimmer is a building that filters Carbon Dioxide from the air and traps it in Water, converting the Water to Polluted Water. It requires a power connection, and clean Water to be pumped in.
carbon_skimmer.flavorText: Carbon skimmers remove large amounts of carbon dioxide, but produce no breathable air.
carbon_skimmer.storage: Water: 1 kgCarbon Dioxide: 720 gPolluted Water: 1 kg

deodorizer.name: Deodorizer
deodorizer.description: Uses Sand to filter Polluted Oxygen from the air, reducing Disease spread.
deodorizer.summary: The Deodorizer is a building that reduces the threat of Slimelung infection by purifying Polluted Oxygen in its vicinity.

electrolyzer.name: Electrolyzer
electrolyzer.description: Converts Water into Oxygen and Hydrogen.Becomes idle when the area reaches maximum pressure capacity.
electrolyzer.summary: The Electrolyzer is a machine that uses electricity to split Water into its constituent Oxygen and Hydrogen.
electrolyzer.flavorText: Water goes in one end, life sustaining oxygen comes out the other.

oxygen_diffuser.name: Oxygen Diffuser
oxygen_diffuser.description: Converts large amounts of Algae into Oxygen.Becomes idle when the area reaches maximum pressure capacity.
oxygen_diffuser.summary: The Oxygen Diffuser is the first structure available for Oxygen production. It consumes 550g/s of Algae to produce 500g/s of Oxygen.
oxygen_diffuser.flavorText: Oxygen diffusers are inefficient, but output enough oxygen to keep a colony breathing.

rust_deoxidizer.name: Rust Deoxidizer
rust_deoxidizer.description: Converts Rust into Oxygen and Chlorine.Becomes idle when the area reaches maximum pressure capacity.
rust_deoxidizer.summary: The Rust Deoxidizer is an alternative method of Oxygen production utilizing Rust Biome's materials. Although it does not produce as much Oxygen as the Electrolyzer, it uses only half the power and serves as a source of Iron Ore.
rust_deoxidizer.flavorText: Rust and salt goes in, oxygen comes out.

sublimation_station.name: Sublimation Station
sublimation_station.description: Speeds up the conversion of Polluted Dirt into Polluted Oxygen.
sublimation_station.summary: The Sublimation Station is a building that speeds up the conversion of into . It becomes idle when area reaches maximum pressure capacity.
sublimation_station.flavorText: Sublimination is the sublime process by which solids convert into gas.

bottle_drainer.name: Bottle Drainer
bottle_drainer.description: Drains bottled Liquids into Liquid Pipes.
bottle_drainer.summary: A Bottle Drainer can put loose bottles of liquids back into pipes.
bottle_drainer.flavorText: A bottle drainer's Element Filter can be used to designate areas for specific liquid storage.

bottle_emptier.name: Bottle Emptier
bottle_emptier.description: Empties bottled Liquids back into the world.
bottle_emptier.summary: The Bottle Emptier is a building used for emptying bottles of liquid into specific locations.
bottle_emptier.flavorText: A bottle emptier's Element Filter can be used to designate areas for specific liquid storage.

bottle_filler.name: Bottle Filler
bottle_filler.description: Automatically stores piped Liquids into bottles for manual transport.
bottle_filler.summary: A Bottle Filler allows duplicants to manually transport bottles of liquids filled through the piping system.
bottle_filler.flavorText: Bottle fillers allow Duplicants to manually deliver liquids from place to place.

conduction_panel.name: Conduction Panel
conduction_panel.description: Carries Liquid, allowing extreme temperature exchange with overlapping buildings.
conduction_panel.summary: Conduction panel is a building that exchanges heat with overlapping buildings even in a vacuum.

gunk_extractor.name: Gunk Extractor
gunk_extractor.description: Cleanses stale Liquid Gunk build-up from Duplicant's bionic parts.
gunk_extractor.summary: The Gunk Extractor is the equivalent of a toilet for a Bionic Duplicant.
gunk_extractor.flavorText: Bionic Duplicants are much more relaxed after a visit to the gunk extractor.

insulated_liquid_pipe.name: Insulated Liquid Pipe
insulated_liquid_pipe.description: Carries Liquid with minimal change in Temperature.Can be run through wall and floor tile.
insulated_liquid_pipe.summary: Insulated Liquid Pipes are a type of Liquid Pipe that greatly slows down the heat exchange between the liquid content and the environment. It costs 4 times mass compared to the regular Liquid Pipes.
insulated_liquid_pipe.flavorText: Pipe insulation prevents liquid contents from siginificantly changing temperature in transit.

lavatory.name: Lavatory
lavatory.description: Gives Duplicants a place to relieve themselves.Spreads very few Germs.
lavatory.summary: The Lavatory is a building used by Duplicants to empty their bladders. It requires Water intake and produces Polluted Water and Food Poisoning Germs. Some of these germs are left on each Duplicant that uses it. It is an upgrade from the Outhouse, as it uses plumbing to dispose of waste and produces fewer Germs.
lavatory.flavorText: Lavatories transmit fewer germs to Duplicants' skin and require no emptying.
lavatory.effects: Polluted Water: +11.7 kg @ per useFood Poisoning: +105,000 germs per use

liquid_bridge.name: Liquid Bridge
liquid_bridge.description: Runs one Liquid Pipe section over another without joining them.Can be run through wall and floor tile.
liquid_bridge.summary: Liquid Bridge is used to avoid two separate liquid pipelines from touching so they do not mix their liquids. Liquid must flow from input to output. The input should connect through pipes to a liquid source like a pump, and the output should connect to buildings that consume or release the liquid, like Liquid Vents.
liquid_bridge.flavorText: Separate pipe systems help preventing building damage caused by mingled pipe contents.

liquid_filter.name: Liquid Filter
liquid_filter.description: Sieves one Liquid out of a mix, sending it into a dedicated Filtered Output Pipe.Can only filter one liquid type at a time.
liquid_filter.summary: Liquid Filter removes the selected Liquid out of a stream of an inbound liquid mixture, sending it into a separate, filtered output Pipe.
liquid_filter.flavorText: All liquids are sent into the building's output pipe, except the liquid chosen for filtering.

liquid_meter_valve.name: Liquid Meter Valve
liquid_meter_valve.description: Tracks the mass of liquid flow through the pipe.
liquid_meter_valve.summary: Liquid Meter Valve is a building used to track and control the mass of liquid flowed through Liquid Pipes. It will shut off the pipe once the total amount meets the set value.
liquid_meter_valve.flavorText: Connects to an Automation grid to automatically turn Liquid flow off when the specified amount has passed through it.
liquid_meter_valve.autoInGreen: Reset counter and start liquid flow
liquid_meter_valve.autoOutGreen: When the total amount of liquid meets the set value.
liquid_meter_valve.autoOutRed: When the amount of liquid is below the set value.

liquid_pipe.name: Liquid Pipe
liquid_pipe.description: Carries Liquid between Outputs and Intakes.Can be run through wall and floor tile.
liquid_pipe.summary: Liquid Pipes are the base Liquid Pipe and transport liquid between building intakes and outputs.
liquid_pipe.flavorText: Liquid pipes are used to connect the inputs and outputs of plumbed buildings.

liquid_pipe_element_sensor.name: Liquid Pipe Element Sensor
liquid_pipe_element_sensor.description: Sends a Green Signal when the selected Liquid is detected within a pipe.
liquid_pipe_element_sensor.summary: Liquid Pipe Element Sensor is an automation sensor that detects the content of a Liquid Pipe. It has an element filter for player to choose a type of Liquid. It must be built in the same tile as a Liquid Pipe segment. When the chosen Liquid is detected in the pipe segment, it will output a Green signal. Otherwise it will output a Red signal.
liquid_pipe_element_sensor.flavorText: Element Sensors can be used to detect the presence of a specific liquid in a pipe.

liquid_pipe_germ_sensor.name: Liquid Pipe Germ Sensor
liquid_pipe_germ_sensor.description: Sends a Green Signal or a Red Signal based on the internal Germ count of the pipe.
liquid_pipe_germ_sensor.summary: Liquid Pipe Germ Sensor is an automation sensor to detect the germ count in a Liquid Pipe.
liquid_pipe_germ_sensor.flavorText: Germ sensors can help control automation behavior in the presence of germs.
liquid_pipe_germ_sensor.autoOutGreen: When the germ count in the pipe meets the criteria
liquid_pipe_germ_sensor.autoOutRed: When the germ count in the pipe does not meet the criteria

liquid_pipe_thermo_sensor.name: Liquid Pipe Thermo Sensor
liquid_pipe_thermo_sensor.description: Sends a Green Signal or a Red Signal when pipe contents enter the chosen Temperature range.
liquid_pipe_thermo_sensor.summary: Liquid Pipe Thermo Sensor is an automation sensor to detect the temperature of liquid content in a Liquid Pipe.
liquid_pipe_thermo_sensor.flavorText: Thermo sensors disable buildings when their pipe contents reach a certain temperature.
liquid_pipe_thermo_sensor.autoOutGreen: When temperature of liquid content meets the criteria
liquid_pipe_thermo_sensor.autoOutRed: When temperature of liquid content does not meet the criteria

liquid_pump.name: Liquid Pump
liquid_pump.description: Draws in Liquid and runs it through Pipes.Must be submerged in Liquid.
liquid_pump.summary: The Liquid Pump draws in Liquid and runs it through the connected Liquid Pipe. It must be submerged in Liquid to function. The pump will also stop functioning if its Output Pipe is full. It will not consume any Power when not pumping.
liquid_pump.flavorText: Piping a pump's output to a building's intake will send liquid to that building.

liquid_rocket_port_loader.name: Liquid Rocket Port Loader
liquid_rocket_port_loader.description: Allows Liquids to be loaded in the Liquid Cargo Tank of a linked rocket.Automatically links when built to the side of a Rocket Platform.Uses the liquid filters set on the linked Rocket Platform.
liquid_rocket_port_loader.summary: Liquid Rocket Port Loader allow Liquids to be loaded into the Liquid Cargo Tank of a linked rocket.
liquid_rocket_port_loader.flavorText: Rockets must be landed to load or unload resources.
liquid_rocket_port_loader.requires: must be built next to Rocket Platform
liquid_rocket_port_loader.effects: Allows loading of Liquid Cargo Tank

liquid_rocket_port_unloader.name: Liquid Rocket Port Unloader
liquid_rocket_port_unloader.description: Allows Liquids to be unloaded from the Liquid Cargo Tank of a linked rocket.Automatically links when built to the side of a Rocket Platform.It has build-in liquid filters.
liquid_rocket_port_unloader.summary: Liquid Rocket Port Unloader allow Liquids to be unloaded from the storage of a linked rocket.
liquid_rocket_port_unloader.flavorText: Rockets must be landed to load or unload resources.
liquid_rocket_port_unloader.requires: must be built next to Rocket Platform
liquid_rocket_port_unloader.effects: Allows unloading of Liquid Cargo Tank

liquid_shutoff.name: Liquid Shutoff
liquid_shutoff.description: Connects to an Automation grid to automatically turn Liquid flow on or off.
liquid_shutoff.summary: Liquid Shutoff is a Plumbing building that is used to block liquids from passing when it receives an Automation signal.
liquid_shutoff.flavorText: Automated piping saves power and time by removing the need for Duplicant input.

liquid_valve.name: Liquid Valve
liquid_valve.description: Controls the Liquid volume permitted through Pipes.
liquid_valve.summary: Liquid Valve allows the player to control or stop the contents of a Liquid Pipe. Best to use after branching. Maintains pressure in an empty pipe before deconstructing it. Because it allows liquid flow only one way, it can also be used to give the game a hint what flow direction the liquid has when the pipe grid gets more complicated.
liquid_valve.flavorText: Valves control the amount of liquid that moves through pipes, preventing waste.

liquid_vent.name: Liquid Vent
liquid_vent.summary: Liquid Vent is a Plumbing building that releases liquids from the connected Liquid Pipe.
liquid_vent.flavorText: Vents are an exit point for liquids from plumbing systems.

mini_liquid_pump.name: Mini Liquid Pump
mini_liquid_pump.description: Draws in a small amount of Liquid and runs it through Pipes.Must be submerged in liquid.
mini_liquid_pump.summary: The Mini Liquid Pump is a smaller, more compact version of the Liquid Pump.
mini_liquid_pump.flavorText: Mini pumps are useful for moving small quantities of liquid with minimum power.

outhouse.name: Outhouse
outhouse.description: Gives Duplicants a place to relieve themselves.Requires no Piping.Must be periodically emptied of Polluted Dirt.
outhouse.summary: The Outhouse is a building used by Duplicants to empty their bladder. It requires no plumbing, and instead uses Dirt and requires periodic emptying by a Duplicant. The Outhouse produces Polluted Dirt as well as Food Poisoning Germs, some of which are left on each Duplicant that uses it.
outhouse.flavorText: The colony that eats together, excretes together.
outhouse.requires: Dirt: 13 kg per useDuplicant operation to empty it
outhouse.effects: Polluted Dirt: 19.7 kg @ per useFood Poisoning: 200,000 germs per use

pitcher_pump.name: Pitcher Pump
pitcher_pump.description: Manually pumps Liquid into bottles for transport.Duplicants can only carry liquids that are bottled.
pitcher_pump.summary: The Pitcher Pump pumps Liquid below it into bottles for transport. Duplicants can only carry bottled liquids. A Pitcher Pump is required to supply buildings that require liquids, but do not have piping intakes.
pitcher_pump.flavorText: Pitcher Pumps allow Duplicants to bottle and deliver liquids from place to place.

radiant_liquid_pipe.name: Radiant Liquid Pipe
radiant_liquid_pipe.description: Carries Liquid, allowing extreme Temperature exchange with the surrounding environment.Can be run through wall and floor tile.
radiant_liquid_pipe.summary: Radiant Liquid Pipes are a type of Liquid Pipe that greatly accelerates the heat exchange between the liquid content and the environment.
radiant_liquid_pipe.flavorText: Radiant pipes pumping cold liquid can be run through hot areas to help cool them down.

shower.name: Shower
shower.description: Improves Duplicant Morale and removes surface Germs.
shower.summary: Shower is a plumbing Building that provides a +3 Morale bonus on use. Showers take 16 seconds to operate during which they consume 1 kg of Water and produce 1 kg of Polluted Water per second.
shower.flavorText: Regularly showering will prevent Duplicants spreading germs to the things they touch.
shower.effects: Polluted Water: 1 kg/s for 16 sCures: Soggy Feet and Sopping Wet effectsMorale +3

wall_toilet.name: Wall Toilet
wall_toilet.description: Gives Duplicants a place to relieve themselves. Empties directly on the other side of the wall.Spreads very few Germs.
wall_toilet.summary: The Wall Toilet is a building used by Duplicants to empty their bladders. It requires Water intake and produces Polluted Water and Food Poisoning Germs. Some of these germs are left on each Duplicant that uses it. It is a smaller alternative to both the Lavatory and the Outhouse but requires a wall to attach to and is a great option for Rocketry.
wall_toilet.flavorText: Wall Toilets transmit fewer germs to Duplicants and require no emptying.
wall_toilet.effects: Polluted Water: +9.2 kg @ per useFood Poisoning: +120,000 germs per use

battery.name: Battery
battery.description: Stores Power from generators, then provides that Power to buildings.Loses charge over time.
battery.summary: The Battery is a building which can be connected to power circuits to store excess energy for later use. Batteries will charge, using power from the circuit, whenever production exceeds consumption, and discharge, providing power, when the reverse is true. A battery containing charge will lose 1 kJ/cycle to power runoff, and produce 1.25 kDTU/s of heat.
battery.flavorText: Batteries allow power from generators to be stored for later.

coal_generator.name: Coal Generator
coal_generator.description: Converts Coal into electrical Power.Produces Carbon Dioxide
coal_generator.summary: Coal Generator produces power when supplied with Coal. It will operate until it runs out of fuel. It can be configured to be active only when the stored energy level in connected batteries drops below a set percentage. The generator can hold 600 kg of coal and can therefore generate 360 kJ of energy before being refilled, enough to charge 9 Jumbo Batteries.
coal_generator.flavorText: Burning coal produces more energy than manual power, but emits heat and exhaust.

compact_discharger.name: Compact Discharger
compact_discharger.description: Converts stored energy from Power Banks into power for connected buildings.
compact_discharger.summary: Compact Discharger is a building that produces energy if provided with Power Banks.
compact_discharger.flavorText: A small standalone power center that can be mounted on the floor or wall

conductive_wire.name: Conductive Wire
conductive_wire.description: Connects buildings to Power sources.Can be run through wall and floor tile.
conductive_wire.summary: Conductive Wire is used to transport power between machines just like Wire. Conductive Wire does not incur a Decor penalty and it has a maximum power capacity of 2 kW. However, it requires Refined Metal for construction.
conductive_wire.flavorText: My duplicants prefer the look of conductive wire to the regular raggedy stuff.

conductive_wire_bridge.name: Conductive Wire Bridge
conductive_wire_bridge.description: Carries more Wattage than a regular Wire Bridge without overloading.Runs one wire section over another without joining them.
conductive_wire_bridge.summary: Conductive Wire Bridge runs one section of wire overtop another without joining their Power grids.
conductive_wire_bridge.flavorText: Can be run through wall and floor tile.Splitting generators onto separate systems can prevent overloads and wasted electricity.

heavi_watt_conductive_joint_plate.name: Heavi-Watt Conductive Joint Plate
heavi_watt_conductive_joint_plate.description: Carries more Wattage than a regular Heavi-Watt Joint Plate without overloading.Allows Heavi-Watt Conductive Wire to be run through wall and floor tile.
heavi_watt_conductive_joint_plate.summary: Heavi-Watt Conductive Joint Plate allows Heavi-Watt Conductive Wire to be run through wall and floor tiles, and functions as such.
heavi_watt_conductive_joint_plate.flavorText: Joint plates can run Heavi-Watt Conductive Wires through walls without leaking gas or liquid.

heavi_watt_conductive_wire.name: Heavi-Watt Conductive Wire
heavi_watt_conductive_wire.description: Carries more Wattage than regular WIRE without overloading.Cannot be run through wall and floor tile.
heavi_watt_conductive_wire.summary: Heavi-Watt Conductive Wire is used for the same purposes as Heavi-Watt Wire (to carry large amounts of power between generators and transformers) and is considered the superior option in most regards—compared to the latter, it carries 30 kW more before overloading and it has a smaller Decor penalty (–20 vs. –25) and Decor effect radius (4 tiles vs. 6 tiles). These benefits come at the cost of requiring Refined Metal instead of Metal Ore; however, this allows for it to be built from Gold, which reduces its Decor penalty by 50% (to –10).
heavi_watt_conductive_wire.flavorText: Higher wattage wire is used to avoid power overloads, particularly for strong generators.

heavi_watt_joint_plate.name: Heavi-Watt Joint Plate
heavi_watt_joint_plate.description: Allows Heavi-Watt Wire to be run through wall and floor tile.Functions as regular tile.
heavi_watt_joint_plate.summary: Heavi-Watt Joint Plate allows Heavi-Watt Wire to be run through wall and floor tiles, and functions as such.
heavi_watt_joint_plate.flavorText: Joint plates can run Heavi-Watt Wires through walls without leaking gas or liquid.

heavi_watt_wire.name: Heavi-Watt Wire
heavi_watt_wire.description: Carries more Wattage than regular Wire without overloading.Cannot be run through wall and floor tile.
heavi_watt_wire.summary: Heavi-Watt Wire carries 20 times more power than a standard Wire, but causes very low decor values for a wide area. It should therefore not run along the pathways the Duplicants walk or work along regularly.
heavi_watt_wire.flavorText: Higher wattage wire is used to avoid power overloads, particularly for strong generators.

hydrogen_generator.name: Hydrogen Generator
hydrogen_generator.summary: Hydrogen Generator produces power when supplied with Hydrogen gas through a Gas Pump.
hydrogen_generator.flavorText: Hydrogen generators are exceptionally efficient, emitting next to no waste.

insulated_conductive_wire.name: Insulated Conductive Wire
insulated_conductive_wire.description: Carries more Wattage than a regular Conductive Wire without overloading. Can be run through wall and floor tile.
insulated_conductive_wire.summary: Insulated Conductive Wire is used to transport power between machines just like Wire or Conductive Wire. Like Conductive Wire, it does not incur a Decor penalty. In addition, it has a maximum power capacity of 4 kW, twice that of Conductive Wire. However, it requires Refined Metal as well as or Plastics for construction, making it more expensive than Conductive Wire.
insulated_conductive_wire.flavorText: It's quite unobtrusive, as far as wiring goes.

insulated_conductive_wire_bridge.name: Insulated Conductive Wire Bridge
insulated_conductive_wire_bridge.description: Carries more Wattage than a regular Conductive Wire Bridge without overloading. Runs one wire section over another without joining them. Can be run through wall and floor tile.
insulated_conductive_wire_bridge.summary: Insulated Conductive Wire Bridge runs one section of wire over the top of another without joining their Power grids.
insulated_conductive_wire_bridge.flavorText: Splitting generators onto separate wystems can prevent overloads and wasted electricity.

jumbo_battery.name: Jumbo Battery
jumbo_battery.description: Stores Power from generators, then provides that Power to buildings.Slightly loses charge over time.
jumbo_battery.summary: Jumbo Battery is used to store extra power that your duplicants create. It must be tied via power wires to run. It uses power when no duplicants/machines produce power until it runs out of stored power. The power in the battery slowly dissipates when not in use. It has the most power density among batteries.
jumbo_battery.flavorText: Larger batteries hold more power and keep systems running longer before recharging.

large_discharger.name: Large Discharger
large_discharger.description: Efficiently converts stored energy from Power Banks into power for connected buildings.
large_discharger.summary: Large Discharger is a building that produces energy if provided with Power Banks.
large_discharger.flavorText: It's basically its own power grid.

large_power_transformer.name: Large Power Transformer
large_power_transformer.description: Limits Power flowing through the Transformer to 4 kW.
large_power_transformer.summary: Large Power Transformer is intended to separate two circuits to protect the circuit at output side from overload damage. Like the Power Transformer, it works as a buffer between generators and primary circuits, but allowing 4 kW on those primary circuits instead of 1 kW.
large_power_transformer.flavorText: Connect Batteries on the large side to act as a valve and prevent Wires from drawing more than 4 kW.

manual_generator.name: Manual Generator
manual_generator.description: Converts manual labor into electrical Power
manual_generator.summary: Manual Generator is a power source that must be manually operated to produce electricity. It is the first power producer unlocked. It requires a duplicant constantly running on it in order to produce electricity. While it is a renewable power source, it reduces a colony's productivity as it produces a relatively small amount of power and prevents a duplicant from doing other jobs.
manual_generator.flavorText: Watching duplicants run on it is adorable... the electrical power is just an added bonus.

natural_gas_generator.name: Natural Gas Generator
natural_gas_generator.description: Converts Natural Gas into electrical Power.Produces Carbon Dioxide and Polluted Water.
natural_gas_generator.summary: The Natural Gas Generator uses to produce electricity, and releases through the attached Gas Pipe, and drops on the ground. Natural Gas has to be brought in through a Gas Pipe connected to the input tile of the generator. The gas must be pure - any other kind of gas will damage the generator.
natural_gas_generator.flavorText: Natural gas generators leak polluted water and are best built above a waste reservoir.

peat_burner.name: Peat Burner
peat_burner.description: Burns Peat to produce electrical Power. Produces a small amount of Carbon Dioxide and Polluted Water.
peat_burner.summary: is a generator that uses Peat in order to produce power and has carbon dioxide and polluted water as byproducts.
peat_burner.flavorText: It gives off an aroma that some Duplicants find inexplicably nostalgic
peat_burner.effects: Polluted Water +200 g/s @ + Carbon Dioxide: +40 g/s @ +

petroleum_generator.name: Petroleum Generator
petroleum_generator.description: Converts Petroleum, Ethanol, or Biodiesel into electrical Power.Produces Carbon Dioxide and Polluted Water.
petroleum_generator.summary: Petroleum Generator uses Petroleum, Ethanol, or Biodiesel to produce electricity, and emits Polluted Water and Carbon Dioxide in the vicinity.
petroleum_generator.flavorText: Petroleum generators have a high energy output but produce a great deal of waste.

power_bank_charger.name: Power Bank Charger
power_bank_charger.description: Converts empty Eco Power Banks into fully charged units ready for reuse.
power_bank_charger.summary: The Power Bank Charger is used to charge Empty Eco Power Banks. The building consumes 480 W of power, and delivers 400 W into the Eco Power Bank (a -80 W inefficiency). As Eco Power Banks have a capacity of 120 kJ, charging one will take 300 seconds, or half a Cycle.
power_bank_charger.flavorText: Bionic Duplicants rely on a steady supply of power to function.

power_control_station.name: Power Control Station
power_control_station.description: Produces Microchip to increase the Power output of generators.Assigned Duplicants must possess the Electrical Enginering Skill
power_control_station.summary: Power Control Station is a building used to process refined metals into Microchips to give the Engie's Tune-Up modifier to one generator in any Power Plant room, which increases electricity production by 50% with no additional resource consumption for 3 or more cycles (regardless if the generator is running or not).
power_control_station.flavorText: Only one Duplicant may be assigned to a station at a time.
power_control_station.requires: Refined Metal: -5 kg per useDuplicant operationElectrical Engineering skillDedicated Room: Power Plant

power_shutoff.name: Power Shutoff
power_shutoff.description: Connects to an Automation grid to automatically turn Power on or off.Does not affect circuitry preceding the switch.
power_shutoff.summary: Power Shutoff controls electricity flow using Automation signals. It disables underlying wire and does not affect other circuitry.
power_shutoff.flavorText: Automated systems save power and time by removing the need for Duplicant input.

power_transformer.name: Power Transformer
power_transformer.description: Limits Power flowing through the Transformer to 1000 W.
power_transformer.summary: Power Transformer is a building intended to separate two circuits to protect against overload damage or to force power into another circuit. It works as a buffer between circuits, providing up to 1000 W from its internal battery to one circuit while consuming power from the other circuit. Since the output is limited, it can safely convert power from a higher wattage source (e.g. Heavi-Watt Wire, which can carry up to 20 kW) down to a lower wattage (e.g. Wire, which can only carry up to 1 kW). Multiple transformers can be connected on a circuit as either consumer or producer.
power_transformer.flavorText: Connect Batteries on the large side to act as a valve and prevent Wires from drawing more than 1000 W and suffering overload damage.

smart_battery.name: Smart Battery
smart_battery.description: Stores Power from generators, then provides that Power to buildings.Sends a Green Signal or Red Signal based on the configuration of the Logic Activation Parameters.
smart_battery.summary: Smart Battery stores excess power from generators, but loses charge over time. Unlike other batteries it can be used for automation purposes.
smart_battery.flavorText: Very slightly loses charge over time.Smart batteries send a Green Signal when they require charging.

solar_panel.name: Solar Panel
solar_panel.description: Converts Sunlight into electrical Power.Must be exposed to space.
solar_panel.summary: The Solar Panel is a building that converts light into power. It generates for every Lux absorbed, up to a maximum output of . This cap is reached when the Solar Panel receives a total illumination of Lux across its tiles. Because it can absorb light from 14 tiles (a 7×2 area), maximum output occurs at an average illumination of per tile.
solar_panel.flavorText: Solar panels convert high intensity Sunlight into power and produce zero waste.

steam_turbine.name: Steam Turbine
steam_turbine.description: Draws in Steam from the tiles directly below the machine's foundation and uses it to generate electrical Power.Outputs Water.
steam_turbine.summary: The Steam Turbine is a Generator powered by the heat energy contained within hot Steam, usually transferred from Magma or Thermo Aquatuners. Its unique behaviour of deleting heat energy without consuming materials makes it noticeably useful in cooling applications. Also unique to this generator, its input is taken directly from the environment below, without any intake pipe.
steam_turbine.flavorText: Useful for converting geothermal energy and waste heat into usable power.
steam_turbine.requires: Steam: 2 kg/s @ +Building temperature: below Electrical Engineering
steam_turbine.effects: Water: same mass as input Steam @

switch.name: Switch
switch.description: Turns Power on or off.Does not affect circuitry preceding the switch.
switch.summary: Switch is an Automation building which can disable a single Wire segment. It does not need a foundation to be built.
switch.flavorText: Switches can only affect buildings that come after them on a circuit.

tidal_turbine.name: Tidal Turbine
tidal_turbine.description: Converts the kinetic energy from a Tidal Spring below it into electrical Power.
tidal_turbine.summary: The is a building that can only be built atop a Tidal Spring. It produces of power during only the spouting phase of the spring.
tidal_turbine.flavorText: Enables a colony to run on clean energy.

wire.name: Wire
wire.description: Connects buildings to Power sources.Can be run through wall and floor tile.
wire.summary: Wire is used to transport power between machines. It must be connected to a generator or battery in order to power any other connected machine that requires power.
wire.flavorText: Electrical wire is used to connect generators, batteries and buildings.

wire_bridge.name: Wire Bridge
wire_bridge.description: Runs one wire section over another without joining them. Can be run through wall and floor tile.
wire_bridge.summary: Wire Bridge runs one section of wire overtop another without joining their Power grids.
wire_bridge.flavorText: Splitting generators onto separate grids can prevent overloads and wasted electricity.

wood_burner.name: Wood Burner
wood_burner.description: Burns Wood to produce electrical Power. Produces Carbon Dioxide and Heat.
wood_burner.summary: Wood Burner produces power when supplied with Wood. It will operate until it runs out of Wood. It can be configured to be refueled only when the stored energy level in connected batteries drops below a set percentage.
wood_burner.flavorText: Wood burners are small and easy to maintain, but produce a fair amount of heat.

manual_radbolt_generator.name: Manual Radbolt Generator
manual_radbolt_generator.description: Refines radioactive ores to generate Radbolts.Emits generated Radbolts in the direction of your choosing.
manual_radbolt_generator.summary: }}The Manual Radbolt Generator is the most basic way of generating Radbolts needed for advanced research in Spaced Out. Like the Radbolt Reflector, bolts can be configured to emit in eight directions around its output port.
manual_radbolt_generator.flavorText: Radbolts are necessary for producing Materials Science research.

radbolt_chamber.name: Radbolt Chamber
radbolt_chamber.description: Stores Radbolts in a high-energy state, ready for transport.
radbolt_chamber.summary: The Radbolt Chamber is a Radbolt storage device.

radbolt_generator.name: Radbolt Generator
radbolt_generator.description: Attracts nearby Radiation to generate Radbolts.Emits generated Radbolts in the direction of your choosing when the set Radbolt threshold is reached.Radbolts collected will gradually decay while this building is disabled.
radbolt_generator.summary: The Radbolt Generator collects radiation from the surrounding area to create Radbolts. Like the Radbolt Reflector, bolts can be configured to emit in eight directions around its output port.
radbolt_generator.flavorText: Radbolts are necessary for producing Materials Science research.

radbolt_joint_plate.name: Radbolt Joint Plate
radbolt_joint_plate.description: Receives Radbolts from Radbolt Generators and directs them through walls. All other materials and elements will be blocked from passage.
radbolt_joint_plate.flavorText: Allows Radbolts to pass through walls.

radbolt_reflector.name: Radbolt Reflector
radbolt_reflector.description: Receives and redirects Radbolts from Radbolt Generators.
radbolt_reflector.summary: Radbolt Reflectors redirects Radbolts. The bolts are emitted in the direction of the players choosing.
radbolt_reflector.flavorText: We were all out of mirrors.

radiation_lamp.name: Radiation Lamp
radiation_lamp.description: Emits radiation when powered that can be collected by a Radbolt generator.
radiation_lamp.summary: Radiation Lamps consume Uranium Ore to produce ambient radiation in a cone shape to the left or right of the building. Depleted Uranium is produced as byproduct and dropped in packets of 5 kg once a day.
radiation_lamp.flavorText: Duplicants can become sick if exposed to radiation without protection.

research_reactor.name: Research Reactor
research_reactor.description: Uses Enriched Uranium to produce Radiation Generates a massive amount of Heat.
research_reactor.summary: Research Reactor uses Enriched Uranium to quickly heat up water-based coolant (, , or ) which turns into Steam that can be used to power Steam Turbines. This process also creates large amounts of Radiation and as byproduct.
research_reactor.flavorText: Radbolt generators and reflectors make radiation usable by other buildings.
research_reactor.storage: Enriched Uranium: 120 kg (+)Water: 90 kg (+)Nuclear Waste: 100 kg

uranium_centrifuge.name: Uranium Centrifuge
uranium_centrifuge.description: Extracts Enriched Uranium from Uranium Ore.Outputs Depleted Uranium in molten form.
uranium_centrifuge.summary: The Uranium Centruge building consumes of and produces of and every 40 seconds. The Enriched Uranium will be at the same temperature as the Uranium Ore, and the Liquid Uranium will be at . This does not require Duplicant operation.
uranium_centrifuge.flavorText: Enriched Uranium is a specialized substance that can be used to fuel Nuclear Reactor (Spaced Out).

algae_distiller.name: Algae Distiller
algae_distiller.summary: The Algae Distiller converts Slime into Algae and Polluted Water. It will output the Polluted Water to its output pipe, and drop the created Algae on the ground from its bottom right tile once 30 kg have accumulated.
algae_distiller.flavorText: Algae distillers convert disease-causing slime into algae for oxygen production.

bleach_stone_hopper.name: Bleach Stone Hopper
bleach_stone_hopper.description: Uses Salt and Gold to produce Bleach Stone.
bleach_stone_hopper.summary: Bleach Stone Hopper is a Refinement building that provides a controlled way to produce Bleach Stone.
bleach_stone_hopper.flavorText: Bleach stone is useful for sanitation and geotuning.

compost.name: Compost
compost.description: Reduces Polluted Dirt and other compostables down into Dirt.
compost.summary: The Compost breaks Polluted Dirt and other Compostable items down into Dirt. It can be used to dispose of surplus of Food or Seeds provided that these resources have been marked for composting. The pile needs to be flipped by a Duplicant once every 50 kg of Dirt produced.
compost.flavorText: Composts safely deal with biological waste, producing fresh dirt.

desalinator.name: Desalinator
desalinator.description: Removes Salt from Brine or Salt Water, producing Water.
desalinator.summary: The Desalinator is a building that filters Salt Water or Brine to make water and salt.
desalinator.flavorText: Salt can be refined into table salt for a mealtime morale boost.

diamond_press.name: Diamond Press
diamond_press.description: Uses Power and Radbolts to crush Refined Carbon into DiamondDuplicants will not fabricate items unless recipes are queued and Refined Carbon has been discovered.
diamond_press.summary: The Diamond Press is a Refinement Building with a Radbolt port on its center tile. It serves as a way of providing a renewable source of Diamond.
diamond_press.requires: Duplicant Operation100 kg Refined Carbon1000 Radbolts

emulsifier.name: Emulsifier
emulsifier.description: Combines Liquids and other inputs into fluid compounds.Duplicants will not fabricate emulsions unless recipes are queued.
emulsifier.summary: The Emulsifier is a Refinement building that can create liquids. Fabrication errands use the operating priority but is affected by the Science skill. Duplicants must learn the Advanced Research Skill to operate the Emulsifier.
emulsifier.flavorText: It's like a blender, but better.

ethanol_distiller.name: Ethanol Distiller
ethanol_distiller.summary: The Ethanol Distiller converts into , , and .
ethanol_distiller.flavorText: Ethanol distillers convert Wood into burnable Ethanol fuel.
ethanol_distiller.effects: Ethanol: +500 g/s @ +Polluted Dirt: +333.33 g/s @ +Carbon Dioxide: +166.67 g/s @ +

fertilizer_synthesizer.name: Fertilizer Synthesizer
fertilizer_synthesizer.description: Uses Polluted Water to produce Fertilizer
fertilizer_synthesizer.summary: The Fertilizer Synthesizer uses Polluted Water, Dirt, and Phosphorite to produce Fertilizer, as well as Natural Gas. Fertilizer is dropped in lumps of 10 kg at , which can be hotter if any input was above their minimal temperatures. Natural Gas is released at fixed into the surroundings.
fertilizer_synthesizer.flavorText: Fertilizer Synthesizers convert polluted dirt into fertilizer for domestic plants.

glass_forge.name: Glass Forge
glass_forge.description: Produces Molten Glass from raw Sand.Outputs High Temperature Liquid.
glass_forge.summary: The Glass Forge is a Refinement Building that refines Sand into Molten Glass. Created Molten Glass is released through its Liquid Output with a temperature of , and should be cooled by other means. Recipes take a base time of 40s to complete and benefit from high Machinery.
glass_forge.flavorText: Duplicants will not fabricate items unless recipes are queued.Glass can be used to construct window tile.

gleaner.name: Gleaner
gleaner.description: Refines Brackene into Brine and Brackwax, and Ovaline into Caviar and Mucin.
gleaner.summary: The Gleaner is a Refinement building that refines into , producing and as byproducts. It is the only way to obtain Brackwax other than boiling Brackene.
gleaner.flavorText: Duplicants can slather up with brackwax to increase their travel speed in transit tubes.
gleaner.effects: Brackwax: +90 g/sBrine: +810 g/sCarbon Dioxide: +100 g/s @ + or Caviar: +90 g/sMucin: +810 g/sCarbon Dioxide: +100 g/s @ +

kiln.name: Kiln
kiln.description: Fires Clay to produce Ceramic.Duplicants will not fabricate items unless recipes are queued.
kiln.summary: The Kiln is a Refinement Building, which serves the purpose of refining various organic substances into Refined Carbon and Clay into Ceramic.
kiln.flavorText: Kilns can also be used to refine coal into pure carbon.

metal_refinery.name: Metal Refinery
metal_refinery.description: Produces Refined Metals from raw Metal Ore.Significantly Heats and outputs the Liquid piped into it.Duplicants will not fabricate items unless recipes are queued.
metal_refinery.summary: Metal Refinery is a Refinement Building, which serves the purpose of turning Metal Ore into Refined Metal, as well as producing alloys. It produces a lot of heat, and dumps part of it into coolant liquid.
metal_refinery.flavorText: Refined metals are necessary to build advanced electronics and technologies.

molecular_forge.name: Molecular Forge
molecular_forge.description: Processes Rare Materials into advanced industrial goods.Rare materials can be retrieved from space missions.
molecular_forge.summary: The Molecular Forge is a Refinement Building which is required to process Rare Materials brought back from space into high utility materials. Otherwise has no use early, before any space missions come back with cargo.
molecular_forge.flavorText: Duplicants will not fabricate items unless recipes are queued.Rare materials can be procured through rocket missions into space.

oil_refinery.name: Oil Refinery
oil_refinery.description: Converts Crude Oil into Petroleum and Natural Gas.
oil_refinery.summary: The Oil Refinery converts Crude Oil into Petroleum in 2:1 ratio. Both input and main output use Liquid Pipes, and it will also emit Natural Gas to the environment. It has to be operated by Duplicant.
oil_refinery.flavorText: Petroleum can only be produced from the refinement of crude oil.

oxylite_refinery.name: Oxylite Refinery
oxylite_refinery.description: Synthesizes Oxylite using Oxygen and a small amount of Gold.
oxylite_refinery.summary: Oxylite Refinery is a Refinement building capable of producing Oxylite from Oxygen and a small amount of Gold. It is unlocked by the Catalytics research.
oxylite_refinery.flavorText: Oxylite is a solid and easily transportable source of consumable oxygen.

plant_pulverizer.name: Plant Pulverizer
plant_pulverizer.description: Crushes Sleet Wheat Grain or Pincha Peppernut to extract Brackene or Slime to extract Phyto Oil and Dirt.
plant_pulverizer.summary: Plant Pulverizer is a Refinement building that provides an alternative way to Gassy Moo Ranching to produce Brackene by using Water/Mucin and certain cultivable plants. It also extracts Phyto Oil, produces Resin from Amber, and Latex from Gum Wood.
plant_pulverizer.flavorText: For Duplicants who are too squeamish to milk critters.

plywood_press.name: Plywood Press
plywood_press.description: Combines a Binder liquid and Plant Husk to create Plywood.
plywood_press.summary: Plywood Presses consume Resin and Plant Husks to create Plywood, an alternative form of Wood that can be used in the construction of buildings that require wood to build, or as a fuel for Kilns and Smokers.
plywood_press.flavorText: Flattened plant bits are a useful wood substitute.

polymer_press.name: Polymer Press
polymer_press.description: Converts Plastic Monomers into raw Plastic.
polymer_press.summary: Polymer Press is a mid-game machine that transforms Plastic Monomers into Plastic.
polymer_press.flavorText: Plastic can be used to craft unique buildings and goods.

rock_crusher.name: Rock Crusher
rock_crusher.description: Inefficiently produces refined materials from raw resources.Duplicants will not fabricate items unless recipes are queued.
rock_crusher.summary: The Rock Crusher is a Refinement Building. It turns Raw Minerals and Metal Ores into Sand, inefficiently produces Refined Metal, and crushes various other elements into a variety of products such as Lime and Wood.
rock_crusher.flavorText: Rock Crushers loosen nuggets from raw ore and can process many different resources.

sludge_press.name: Sludge Press
sludge_press.description: Separates and other Sludges into their base Elements.Duplicants will not fabricate items unless recipes are queued.
sludge_press.summary: At the Sludge Press, Duplicants separate and other Sludges into their base.
sludge_press.flavorText: What Duplicant doesn't love to play with ?
sludge_press.effects: 60 kg and 90 kg or 60 kg and 90 kg

vulcanizer.name: Vulcanizer
vulcanizer.description: Converts Latex into Rubber. Latex must be dilivered via Liquid Pipes
vulcanizer.flavorText: Making rubber is the first step to crafting gaskets that keep liquids where they ought to be.

water_sieve.name: Water Sieve
water_sieve.description: Produces clean Water from Polluted Water using Sand.Produces Polluted Dirt.
water_sieve.summary: The Water Sieve uses a Filtration Medium to purify . It needs to be supplied a Filtration Medium and receive Polluted Water in a Liquid Pipe on its Input port to function. It will output to the Liquid Pipe on its output slot. It will drop on the floor when its internal storage is full ().
water_sieve.flavorText: Sieves cannot kill germs and pass any they receive into their waste and water output.

auto_sweeper.name: Auto-Sweeper
auto_sweeper.description: Automates Sweeping and Supplying errands by sucking up all nearby Debris.Materials are automatically delivered to any Conveyor Loader, Conveyor Receptacle, storage, or buildings within range.
auto_sweeper.summary: Auto-Sweeper can move items to and from buildings within a 9x9 zone centered on the machine (4 blocks out in each direction). Sweepers can load materials into a building, such as delivering raw food to an Electric Grill then pick up the finished product from the floor and place it in a container such as a Refrigerator in range.
auto_sweeper.flavorText: An auto-sweeper's range can be viewed at any time by clicking on the building.
auto_sweeper.effects: Transport up to 1 tonne of resource to a container

conveyor_bridge.name: Conveyor Bridge
conveyor_bridge.description: Runs one Conveyor Rail section over another without joining them.Can be run through wall and floor tile.
conveyor_bridge.summary: Conveyor Bridge runs one Conveyor Rail section over another without joining them.
conveyor_bridge.flavorText: Separating rail systems helps ensure materials go to the intended destinations.

conveyor_chute.name: Conveyor Chute
conveyor_chute.description: Unloads Solid Materials from a Conveyor Rail onto the floor.
conveyor_chute.summary: Conveyor Chute is a shipping building that drops items in the conveyor system on the ground.
conveyor_chute.flavorText: When materials reach the end of a rail they are dropped back into the world.

conveyor_loader.name: Conveyor Loader
conveyor_loader.description: Loads Solid Materials onto Conveyor Rail for transport.Only loads the resources of your choosing.
conveyor_loader.summary: Conveyor Loader loads Solid Materials onto Conveyor Rails for transport.
conveyor_loader.flavorText: Material filters can be used to determine what resources are sent down the rail.

conveyor_meter.name: Conveyor Meter
conveyor_meter.description: Tracks the mass of solids on the rail.
conveyor_meter.summary: Conveyor Meter is a building used to track and control the mass of solid passed on Conveyor Rails. It will shut off the rail once the total mass meets the set value.
conveyor_meter.flavorText: Connects to an Automation grid to automatically turn material transfer off when the specified amount has passed through it.
conveyor_meter.autoInGreen: Reset counter and start material transfer
conveyor_meter.autoOutGreen: When the total amount of solids meets the set value.
conveyor_meter.autoOutRed: When the amount of solids is below the set value.

conveyor_rail.name: Conveyor Rail
conveyor_rail.description: Transports Solid Materials on a track between Conveyor Loader and Conveyor Receptacle.Can be run through wall and floor tile.
conveyor_rail.summary: Conveyor Rail transports solid materials on a track between Conveyor Loaders and Conveyor Receptacles or Chutes.
conveyor_rail.flavorText: Rails move materials where they'll be needed most, saving Duplicants the walk.

conveyor_rail_element_sensor.name: Conveyor Rail Element Sensor
conveyor_rail_element_sensor.description: Sends a Green Signal when the selected item is detected on a rail.
conveyor_rail_element_sensor.summary: Conveyor Rail Element Sensor is an automation sensor that detects the content of a Conveyor Rail. It has an element filter for the player to choose a type of element. It must be built in the same tile as a Conveyor Rail segment. When the chosen element is detected in the rail, it will output a Green signal. Otherwise it will output a Red signal.
conveyor_rail_element_sensor.flavorText: Element sensor can be used to detect the presence of a specific item on a rail.
conveyor_rail_element_sensor.autoOutGreen: The configured item is on the rail
conveyor_rail_element_sensor.autoOutRed: The configured item is not on the rail

conveyor_rail_germ_sensor.name: Conveyor Rail Germ Sensor
conveyor_rail_germ_sensor.description: Sends a Green Signal or a Red Signal based on internal Germ count of the object on the rail.
conveyor_rail_germ_sensor.summary: Conveyor Rail Germ Sensor is an automation sensor to detect the germ count in a Conveyor Rail.
conveyor_rail_germ_sensor.flavorText: Germ sensor can help control automation behavior in the presence of germs.
conveyor_rail_germ_sensor.autoOutGreen: The number of Germs on the object on the rail is within the selected range

conveyor_rail_thermo_sensor.name: Conveyor Rail Thermo Sensor
conveyor_rail_thermo_sensor.description: Sends a Green Signal or a Red Signal when rail contents enter the chosen Temperature range.
conveyor_rail_thermo_sensor.summary: Conveyor Rail Thermo Sensor is an automation sensor to detect the temperature of debris content in a Conveyor Rail.
conveyor_rail_thermo_sensor.flavorText: Thermo sensors disables buildings when their rail contents reach a certain temperature.
conveyor_rail_thermo_sensor.autoOutGreen: The contained item is within the selected Temperature range

conveyor_receptacle.name: Conveyor Receptacle
conveyor_receptacle.description: Unloads Solid Materials from a Conveyor Rail into storage.
conveyor_receptacle.summary: Conveyor Receptacle serves as an output storage container for Solid Materials from a Conveyor Rail system.
conveyor_receptacle.flavorText: When materials reach the end of a rail they enter a receptacle to be used by Duplicants.

conveyor_shutoff.name: Conveyor Shutoff
conveyor_shutoff.description: Connects to an Automation grid to automatically turn Solid Material transport on or off.
conveyor_shutoff.summary: Conveyor Shutoff is a Shipping building which allows Automation signals to control the flow of material through conveyors.
conveyor_shutoff.flavorText: Automated conveyors save power and time by removing the need for Duplicant input.

robo_miner.name: Robo-Miner
robo_miner.description: Automatically digs out all materials in a set range.
robo_miner.summary: Robo-Miner will mine out a space 7 tiles around itself, in a rectangular shape. It cannot destroy player-built tiles/buildings or any tiles that require Superhard digging proficiency (diamond, abyssalite, etc).
robo_miner.flavorText: A robo-miner's range can be viewed at any time by selecting the building.

solid_filter.name: Solid Filter
solid_filter.description: Separates one Solid from the conveyor, sending it into a dedicated Conveyor Rail.
solid_filter.summary: Solid Filter is a building out of the Shipping tab and works the same as Liquid Filter and Gas Filter.
solid_filter.flavorText: All solids are sent into the building's output conveyor, except the solid chosen for filtering.

solid_rocket_port_loader.name: Solid Rocket Port Loader
solid_rocket_port_loader.description: Allows Solids to be loaded to the storage of a linked rocket.Automatically links when built to the side of a Rocket Platform or another Rocket Port.Uses the solid material filters set on the linked Rocket Platform.
solid_rocket_port_loader.summary: Solid Rocket Port Loader allows Solids to be loaded into the storage of a linked rocket.
solid_rocket_port_loader.flavorText: Rockets must be landed to load or unload resources.
solid_rocket_port_loader.requires: Must be built next to Rocket Platform
solid_rocket_port_loader.effects: Allows loading of Solid Cargo Bays

solid_rocket_port_unloader.name: Solid Rocket Port Unloader
solid_rocket_port_unloader.description: Allows Solids to be unloaded from the storage of a linked rocket.Automatically links when built to the side of a Rocket Platform or another Rocket Port.Uses build-in solid material filters.
solid_rocket_port_unloader.summary: Solid Rocket Port Unloader allows Solids to be unloaded from the storage of a linked rocket.
solid_rocket_port_unloader.flavorText: Rockets must be landed to load or unload resources.
solid_rocket_port_unloader.requires: must be built next to Rocket Platform
solid_rocket_port_unloader.effects: Allows unloading of Solid Cargo Bays

anti_entropy_thermo_nullifier.name: Anti Entropy Thermo-Nullifier
anti_entropy_thermo_nullifier.description: A self-sustaining machine powered by what appears to be refined .Absorbs and neutralizes Heat energy when supplied with
anti_entropy_thermo_nullifier.summary: Anti Entropy Thermo-Nullifier is an example of old technology found only in the Tundras. Very few spawn in each world.

care_package.name: Care Package
care_package.description: Care Packages are only obtainable from the Printing Pod or the Mini-Pod. An active Printing Pod will have a chance to offer between one and two Care Package every three cycles.

computer_desk.name: Computer Desk
computer_desk.description: An intact office desk, decorated with several personal belongings and a barely functioning computer.
computer_desk.summary: The is a Building sometimes found in Ruins. They can be inspected to unlock a random E-mail entry in the Database. Only duplicants with the Demolition skill can deconstruct them and they're impossible to relocate. This may lead to changes in base configuration.

cryotank_3000.name: Cryotank 3000
cryotank_3000.description: The tank appears impossibly old, but smells crisp and brand new.
cryotank_3000.summary: The Cryotank 3000 is a Building found on every Planetoid with the Frozen Friend World Trait and the main Ruins of the Teleport Target Planetoid, even if teleporters are disabled. When operated by a Duplicant, it allows defrosting a random new Duplicant. Doing so unlocks the "First Teleport of Call" Achievement.
cryotank_3000.effects: One random new Duplicant and a Motivated by friend buff.

light_fixture.name: Light Fixture
light_fixture.description: An elegant ceiling lamp, slightly worse for wear.
light_fixture.summary: Light Fixtures are decorative objects found in the ruins. They cannot provide light. They are made of steel and cannot be built, but can now be deconstructed by a duplicant with the demolition skill which is tier 3 construction skill.

locker.name: Locker
locker.summary: Lockers are found in the ruins. When Rummaged they drop one Snazzy Suit or Warm Coat.

lumen_quartz.name: Lumen Quartz
lumen_quartz.description: Lumen quartz emits a soft glowing Light that makes everything look and feel a little rosier.
lumen_quartz.summary: Lumen Quartz are naturally-occurring structures that emit a small amount of Light and Decor in their vicinity.

neural_vacillator.name: Neural Vacillator
neural_vacillator.description: A massive synthetic brain, suspended in a saline solution. There is a chair attached to the device with room for one person.
neural_vacillator.summary: The Neural Vacillator is a mysterious machine found in Ruins. It can give a single Duplicant a new trait, and then it must be recharged.

printing_pod.name: Printing Pod
printing_pod.description: An exceptionally advanced bioprinter of unknown origin.It periodically produces new Duplicants or care packages containing resources.
printing_pod.summary: The Printing Pod is a building that marks the initial location of the colony. Along with the Ration Box, it is one of two buildings generated at the start of every game.

security_door.name: Security Door
security_door.description: A strong door with a sophisticated genetic lock.
security_door.summary: Security Doors can be found in the ruins. They cannot be built, and do not require power to work.

supply_teleporter_input.name: Supply Teleporter Input
supply_teleporter_input.description: A machine capable of teleporting Liquid, Solid, and Gas resources to another Asteroid
supply_teleporter_input.summary: The Supply Teleporter Input is a Building found in Ruins on every starting and secondary Asteroid in Spaced Out!. It has a counterpart, the Supply Teleporter Output on another Asteroid to which it can send resources, and always spawns with Conveyor Loader, and some Conductive Wires.
supply_teleporter_input.requires: It can be activated by a Duplicant with the Field Research skill.

supply_teleporter_output.name: Supply Teleporter Output
supply_teleporter_output.description: A machine capable of teleporting Liquid, Solid, and Gas resources.
supply_teleporter_output.summary: The Supply Teleporter Output is a Building found in Ruins on every starting and secondary Asteroid in Spaced Out!. It has a counterpart, the Supply Teleporter Input on another Asteroid from which resources can be sent to it, and always spawns with Conveyor Chute, and some Conductive Wires.
supply_teleporter_output.requires: It can be activated by a Duplicant with the Field Research skill.

table.name: Table
table.summary: Tables are decorative objects found in the Ruins. They are made of Neutronium and serve no purpose. They cannot be built but can be deconstructed by a duplicant with demolition skill. Another way to destroy or get rid of it is to enter sandbox mode and use the Delete tool. You will not receive any drops from deleting something.

teleporter_receiver.name: Teleporter Receiver
teleporter_receiver.description: The functional remnants of a intricate Teleportation system.
teleporter_receiver.summary: The Teleporter Receiver is a Building found in Ruins on every starting and secondary Asteroid in Spaced Out!. It has a counterpart, the Teleporter Transmitter on another Asteroid to which it can send Duplicants to.

temporal_tear_opener.name: Temporal Tear Opener
temporal_tear_opener.description: A powerful mechanism capable of tearing through the fabric of reality.
temporal_tear_opener.summary: The Temporal Tear Opener can open up the Temporal Tear when conditions are met.

vending_machine.name: Vending Machine
vending_machine.summary: Vending Machines are found in the ruins. When Rummaged they drop one Nutrient Bar.

ice_maker.name: Ice Maker
ice_maker.description: Converts Water into Ice or Snow.
ice_maker.summary: The Ice Maker is a machine that freezes Water into Ice or Snow. It will relocate the heat energy from the Water until the water is Ice/Snow. The ice maker heats up significantly, but the total heat output is negative ~60 to ~64 kDTU/s.
ice_maker.flavorText: Ice makers can be used as a small renewable source of ice and snow.
ice_maker.effects: Ice or Snow: 60 kg per use @

ice_e_fan.name: Ice-E Fan
ice_e_fan.description: Uses Ice to dispense a small amount of Heat.
ice_e_fan.summary: Ice-E Fan is used to cool down the gas around it. It does not require Power but has to be operated manually.
ice_e_fan.flavorText: A Duplicant can work an Ice-E fan to temporarily cool small areas as needed.

liquid_tepidizer.name: Liquid Tepidizer
liquid_tepidizer.description: Warms large bodies of Liquid. Must be fully submerged.
liquid_tepidizer.summary: Liquid Tepidizer warms bodies of Liquid to the limit of . It must be fully submerged in greater than 400kg liquid to work.
liquid_tepidizer.flavorText: Tepidizers heat liquid which can kill waterborne germs.

marine_drill.name: Marine Drill
marine_drill.description: Removes mineral build-up from underwater vents to restore the flow of Gases. Must be built on top of a vent or fissure
marine_drill.flavorText: Once it's all set up, blockages take care of themselves.

oil_well.name: Oil Well
oil_well.description: Extracts Crude Oil using clean Water.Must be built atop an Oil Reservoir.
oil_well.summary: The Oil Well is a building that can only be built atop an Oil Reservoir. It produces when supplied with , however, the Water pumped into the Oil Well cannot be recovered. Produced is at , or higher if the input Water was above .
oil_well.flavorText: Water pumped into an oil reservoir cannot be recovered.

ore_scrubber.name: Ore Scrubber
ore_scrubber.description: Kills a significant amount of Germs present on Raw Ore.
ore_scrubber.summary: The Ore Scrubber is a Utility building that uses piped Chlorine gas to kill Germs on items carried by Duplicants, consuming the gas in the process.
ore_scrubber.flavorText: Scrubbers sanitize freshly mined materials before they're brought into the colony.

space_heater.name: Space Heater
space_heater.description: Radiates a moderate amount of Heat.
space_heater.summary: Space Heater produces a moderate amount of Heat in its immediate vicinity. It will stop working when environmental temperature reaches . It will not operate without a gas around it.
space_heater.flavorText: A space heater will radiate heat for as long as it's powered.

sweepy_s_dock.name: Sweepy's Dock
sweepy_s_dock.description: Stores Liquid and Solid Materials debris from the sweepy.Requires Power to recharge sweepy.
sweepy_s_dock.summary: Sweepy's Dock is a building which makes and charges Sweepy and collects debris from Sweepy. A Sweepy Dock needs 25 kg Refined Metal to make a Sweepy. If a Sweepy Dock is destroyed, its Sweepy explodes and drops part of the dock's metal. A Sweepy will pick up any item, bottled liquids, and mop any liquids. It will collect up to 10kg of the material it sweeps.
sweepy_s_dock.flavorText: Deploys a helpful little Sweepy robot.

thermo_aquatuner.name: Thermo Aquatuner
thermo_aquatuner.description: Cools the Liquid piped through it, but outputs Heat in its immediate vicinity.
thermo_aquatuner.summary: Thermo Aquatuner cools the liquid piped through it and absorbs the Heat itself.
thermo_aquatuner.flavorText: A thermo aquatuner cools liquid and outputs the heat elsewhere.

thermo_regulator.name: Thermo Regulator
thermo_regulator.description: Cools the gas piped through it, but outputs heat in its immediate vicinity.
thermo_regulator.summary: Thermo Regulator cools the Gas piped through it and absorbs the Heat.
thermo_regulator.flavorText: A thermo regulator doesn't remove heat, but relocates it into a new area.
